metadata.description: Visionary marketplace — design intelligence plugin for Claude Code. v1.6.0 adds Anti-Typicality Foundation (Verbalized Sampling), Latent Style Mixing (8D slerp), Constraint-Injection (40 rules), Cross-modal inputs (photo/track/mood/cinematic), Cross-screen flow, Voice-tempo, Runtime Context (circadian/network/patina), and Coined-styles auto-promotion on top of v1.5.x core (Structural-Integrity Gate, motion scoring 2.0, DINOv2, MLLM judge, active governance, taste inheritance, MCP-server).

plugins.name: visionary-claude
plugins.description: 207 design styles, 8-step selection + Stage 1.5 Verbalized Sampling + Stage 2.5 Latent Style Mixing + Stage 2.6 Constraint-Injection. Cross-modal commands (/visionary-from-photo, /visionary-from-track, /visionary-mood, /visionary-cinematic), 12 director-packs, /visionary-flow (5 koherenta states), /visionary-voice (mic→motion), /visionary-patina (design-åldring). Motion Scoring 2.0, MLLM Judge, DINOv2, Active Governance, Taste Inheritance, Structural-Integrity Gate. axe-core critique, DTCG tokens. WCAG 2.2 AA + APCA. 15 frameworks, 20+ languages.
